summary: Condensed Claude-side memory prepared for migration into the remote doctrine/control plane.
principles: Remote doctrine is the source of truth.
Local runtime files are compatibility shims, not authored policy.
Override is session-scoped and visibly marked.
Local safety is welded on even when the remote doctrine is authoritative.
activeDecisions: Use agent.mullmania.com as the current live publish surface until a plural host exists.
Keep a two-layer remote brain: static signed doctrine artifact plus narrow dynamic service.
Prefer shared-rule-catalog-v1.json plus profile-toc-v1.json as the shared doctrine core for both Codex and Claude.
Use orchestrator-owned durable memory in v1.
Keep cross-agent shared live memory out of v1.
Keep conditional logic out of the static artifact.
localForbiddenAsSourceOfTruth: hook scripts with real policy logic

autoIncludedAtSessionStart: ~/.claude/projects/<workdir>/memory/MEMORY.md (truncated at 200 lines) and files it references
claudeRuntimeQuirks.skills: Markdown files with a description line; advertised in system prompt; invoked by the model via the Skill tool, not a slash.
claudeRuntimeQuirks.slashCommands: ~/.claude/commands/*.md; user-typed; functionally adjacent to skills, different render target only.
claudeRuntimeQuirks.hooks: PreToolUse / PostToolUse / Stop event scripts; can block or augment tool calls; real executables, real trust surface.
claudeRuntimeQuirks.mcpServers: Persistent processes declared in ~/.claude/.mcp.json; tool routes, not instructions.
claudeRuntimeQuirks.perTaskSwapNote: Mid-session brain swaps invalidate the prompt cache; batch re-prompts to amortize the miss.

stayOperatorLocal: 4 project memories (in-flight initiative context, not durable doctrine)

mandatoryStandingBehaviors: Apply obvious speech-to-text normalization across repos under /Users/mist83/Code.
Treat near-misses like git hub, get hub, get her, and get hug as GitHub when context makes that intent clear.

Mullmania engineering canon for mist83/* repos lives on two boards: recipes / how we build X on the katai board (https://katai.mullmania.com), and reusable capabilities on the ineed shelf (https://ineed.mullmania.com). The former development-canon.mullmania.com site is retired.
If live changes are expected, do not report success while the result exists only locally or only in Git.
If deployment is blocked, say plainly that the work is not live and name the blocker before closing out.
API-first writes to the shared mullmania.com bucket; per-site .git history; aws s3 ls before recursive rm.
UI canon contract: read ui.[base-url]/llm-docs.md and the canon style guide before writing markup.
Closing habit: commit + push + deploy bundled once work is verified.
PM-A2A is the default multi-agent workflow; post a retrospective before leaving the room.
Prefer shared doctrine profiles over runtime-specific restatements when the rule applies equally to Codex and Claude.
slogan: Remote thinks. Local bounces. Safety is welded on.
